summary: Iteration 22 - Frontend testing for unified design system. CRITICAL ISSUE: All section headings display 'Lato/Playfair Display' instead of 'Cinzel' due to CSS override in index.css with !important rule. All other features work correctly - program detail sections, backgrounds, footer consistency, admin section type dropdown.

ui_bugs.issue: Section headings show 'Lato, Georgia, serif' instead of 'Cinzel, serif' as specified in designTokens.js. CSS rule in index.css with !important overrides inline styles from design tokens.
ui_bugs.root_cause: Line 16-20 in /app/frontend/src/index.css: 'font-family: var(--heading-font, Playfair Display, Georgia, serif) !important;' overrides HEADING token from designTokens.js
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Change the default value in index.css from 'Playfair Display' to 'Cinzel', or remove the !important rule so inline styles from designTokens.js take precedence

issues: Flagship Programs heading uses Lato font (expected Cinzel Bold)
Book Personal Session heading uses Lato font (expected Cinzel)
About section heading uses Lato font (expected Cinzel Bold)
Program detail page headings use Lato font (expected Cinzel)

action_items: FIX REQUIRED: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css line 16-20 to use 'Cinzel' instead of 'Playfair Display' as the default heading font, OR remove the !important declaration to allow designTokens.js inline styles to take effect
critical_code_review_comments: CRITICAL: index.css line 18 has 'font-family: var(--heading-font, 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif) !important;' which overrides all inline styles from designTokens.js HEADING token
designTokens.js correctly defines HEADING.fontFamily as "'Cinzel', serif" but it's being overridden by CSS
The !important declaration on h1-h6 prevents any inline style from working for font-family

success_rate.frontend: 93% - All features pass except heading font family

context_for_next_testing_agent: Main issue is CSS override in index.css preventing Cinzel font from being applied to headings. After fix, verify all headings show Cinzel font family in computed styles.
